title: Towards Language-Agnostic STIPA: Universal Phonetic Transcription to Support Language Documentation at Scale
research_areas: T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
T24 Speech Resources and Processing (including Phonetic Databases, Phonology, Prosody, Speech Recognition, Synthesis and Spoken Language Understanding)
